name: Stuffed Summer Squash
recipeInstructions:
1. Depending on size of squash, allow 1/2 per person.
2. Parboil whole squash in salted water until tender.
3. Remove from water and slice lengthwise.
4. Scoop out center of squash into a bowl.
5. Add an equal amount of finely diced yellow cheese to the squash flesh.
6. Stir in a little cream or milk, salt, and pepper.
7. Return mixture to the squash shell.
8. Top with bread crumbs and dot with butter.
9. Bake until cheese is melted.
